utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these items. Each item is fully specified with detailed information: destination (Lisbon, Portugal), travel_dates (2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05), transportation (flight details with costs and airline info), accommodation (hotel with costs and amenities), activities (specified with costs and type), additional_services (dining and insurance details with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Every element includes the required details, so all 7 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', which in the ground-truth ratings has a rating of 8. The transportation is via 'Budget Airline' in 'economy' class, corresponding to 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class' with a rating of 6. The accommodation is 'Family Haven Hotel', which has a rating of 9. The main activity is 'City Walking Tour + Zoo Visit', which combines two known activities: 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9) and 'Zoo' (rating 9). The dining option is the 'Family Haven Hotel Restaurant' serving 'International' cuisine; since there is no exact match for 'International' in the ground-truth, the closest match is a generic hotel restaurant, but the only relevant restaurant mappings are by cuisine type. Given no direct match, it is not rated separately. The additional service of 'Active travel insurance included' is not rated in the ground-truth data, so it is not mapped.
